_provenance.source: College Scorecard API, U.S. Department of Education
_provenance.notes: Used by the Substack accountability series (Part IIa) for the University of Phoenix completer median federal debt (~$31,553) cited in the non-completer debt footnote. 'latest' resolves to the most recent Scorecard release at fetch time. Median debt fields are cumulative federal loan debt at separation, medians among borrowers. Pinned in tests/data/test_uop_scorecard_debt.py.
